title: A Limit Can Exist Without a Function Value
text: The existence of $$f(0)$$ is separate from the existence of $$\lim_{x\to $$0}f(x)$$.

title: Graph the Parabola by Hand
text: Sketch $$y=x^2+4$$ and leave an open circle at $$(0,4)$$. $$Then$$ $$decide$$ $$what$$ $$the$$ $$graph$$ $$approaches$$ $$near$$ $$x=0$$ and whether the function has a defined value there.

title: Determine the Limit First
text: If the graph approaches $$4$$ from both sides, what is $$\lim_{x\to $$0}f(x)$$?

title: Defined Value Check
text: A hole means the graph is not filled in at that x-value, even if the nearby behavior approaches a number.
